layout.name: width
layout.title: Width
layout.tooltip: The width of the platform. Centered in the middle

layout.name: height
layout.title: Max Height
layout.tooltip: The maximum height of the platform

layout.name: spawnheight
layout.title: Initial Height
layout.tooltip: The height the cloud lift starts at. If set to 0-32, it spawns with it's spawn height. If -1, it will spawn as hidden. Don't set it higher than the max height.
